title: Ved Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Ved — the personal AI agent that remembers everything and proves it.

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file. Supports ~ expansion.

logLevel.description: Minimum log level. 'debug' is verbose, 'error' is silent except for errors.

logFormat.description: Log output format. 'json' for structured logging, 'pretty' for human-readable.

logFile.description: Path to log file. null means stdout only.

provider.description: LLM provider. Ollama is free and local. Anthropic/OpenAI/OpenRouter require API keys.

apiKey.description: API key for the provider. Not needed for Ollama. Can also be set via VED_API_KEY env var.

baseUrl.description: Custom API base URL. Defaults: Anthropic=api.anthropic.com, OpenAI=api.openai.com, Ollama=localhost:11434.

maxTokensPerMessage.description: Maximum tokens in a single LLM response.

maxTokensPerSession.description: Maximum total tokens consumed per session before forced compression.

temperature.description: LLM temperature. 0 = deterministic, higher = more creative.

systemPromptPath.description: Path to a custom system prompt file. null uses Ved's built-in prompt.

vaultPath.description: Path to the Obsidian vault directory. Created automatically by 'ved init'.

workingMemoryMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for T1 working memory (in-prompt conversation context).

ragContextMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for RAG-injected context per message.

compressionThreshold.description: Token count at which T1→T2 compression triggers.

sessionIdleMinutes.description: Minutes of inactivity before a session is considered idle and T1→T2 compression fires.

gitEnabled.description: Enable git version control for the vault. Tracks all knowledge changes.

gitAutoCommitIntervalMinutes.description: Minutes between automatic git commits of vault changes.

ownerIds.description: User IDs with full owner access (Tier 4). At least one required.

tribeIds.description: User IDs with trusted access (Tier 3). Can trigger low-risk tools automatically.

knownIds.description: User IDs with basic access (Tier 2). Most tool calls require approval.

defaultTier.description: Default trust tier for unknown users. 1=Unknown, 2=Known, 3=Tribe, 4=Owner.

approvalTimeoutMs.description: Milliseconds before a pending work order expires. Default: 5 minutes.

maxToolCallsPerMessage.description: Maximum tool calls allowed in a single message pipeline.

maxAgenticLoops.description: Maximum DECIDE→ACT iterations in the agentic loop before forced stop.

anchorInterval.description: Number of audit entries between HMAC anchor checkpoints.

hmacSecret.description: HMAC secret for external anchoring. null disables HMAC anchoring.

vectorTopK.description: Number of top results from vector similarity search.

ftsTopK.description: Number of top results from full-text search (FTS5).

graphMaxDepth.description: Maximum wikilink hops for graph expansion. 0 disables graph walk.

graphMaxNodes.description: Maximum nodes pulled in during graph walk expansion.

maxContextTokens.description: Maximum total tokens for fused RAG context injected into the prompt.

rrfK.description: Reciprocal Rank Fusion constant. Higher values reduce the advantage of top-ranked results.

embedding.description: Embedding model configuration for vector search.

baseUrl.description: Ollama API base URL for embeddings.

batchSize.description: Number of chunks to embed per batch.

dimensions.description: Embedding vector dimensions. Must match the model's output.

chunking.description: Document chunking configuration for RAG indexing.

minTokens.description: Minimum tokens per chunk. Smaller chunks are merged with neighbors.

frontmatterPrefix.description: Prepend YAML frontmatter metadata to each chunk for better retrieval.

config.description: Channel-specific configuration. Varies by channel type.

mcp.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool server configuration.

servers.description: List of MCP tool servers Ved can connect to.

name.description: Unique name for this MCP server.

transport.description: Transport protocol. 'stdio' for local processes, 'http' for remote servers.

command.description: Command to launch the MCP server (stdio transport only).

args.description: Arguments for the server command (stdio transport only).

trustOverride.description: Override trust tier for this server's tools. null uses the caller's tier.
